name: BuiltWith
description: BuiltWith — Technology profiling tool identifying frameworks, CDNs, and analytics on any website.

seo.title: BuiltWith — CDN / Edge / Acceleration
seo.meta_description: BuiltWith: BuiltWith — Technology profiling tool identifying frameworks, CDNs, and analytics on any website.

when_to_use: Identifying CDN, analytics, and CMS stack of competitor sites
Lead generation based on technology stack signals
Market research on framework and tool adoption trends
Discovering which CDN provider powers a target company
Sales prospecting using technology profiling as intent signals

pros: Largest tech stack detection database available
Historical tracking of sites' tech changes
Useful for sales prospecting and competitor research
cons: Paid tiers expensive for list exports
Detection accuracy varies on obfuscated sites
Not a real monitoring or alerting tool
Free tier limits are quite strict
review.verdict: Best-in-class tech stack profiling for B2B sales research, overpriced if you only need occasional lookups.
review.best_for: Sales and marketing teams prospecting by tech stack at scale
review.not_for: Engineers who just need one-off stack detection (use Wappalyzer free)
